idea-plugin.name: Python Doc Links
idea-plugin.description:
Makes file, function, class, and module-level variable references in Python docstrings and line comments Ctrl+Clickable.

Supported patterns:
  • filename.py — opens the file
  • :py:func:`module.func` — function (falls back to class/variable)
  • :py:class:`module.Class` — class definition
  • :py:data:`module.var` — module-level variable
  • :func:` / `:class:` / `:data:` — short Sphinx forms
  • :py:mod:`module` — opens the module file

Example:
def my_func():
    """
    See also: submodule.py
    Calls :py:func:`submodule.process_submodule_data`
    Variable: :py:data:`config.hosters_data`
    Class: :py:class:`ObjectWithProperties`
    """

Developed with AI assistance (Cursor / LLM).
